Bus Timings

X28 Bus Timetable From Lulu Village to Agora Mall

July 19, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus X28 offers a vital transport link connecting diverse neighborhoods and key landmarks across Dubai. Catering to both residents and visitors, this bus service provides a convenient and cost-effective way to explore the city’s bustling districts and cultural attractions.

Bus Timings

At the Lulu Village departure point, the X28 bus operates with a regular schedule throughout the day. Services start from early morning and continue until late evening, accommodating the needs of both commuters and tourists. The timings are reliable, ensuring punctuality and accessibility for passengers.

From Lulu Village From Agora Mall

06:35 06:40
07:05 07:10

Bus X28 Timetable

For the full schedule, you can refer to the official RTA website, or simply follow this link to access the X28 Bus Timings.

Bus Route

The X28 route includes stops at the following locations:

  1. Lulu Village

  2. New Housing

  3. Collapse

  4. Emirates Housing

  5. Russian International School

  6. Galadari Driving School

  7. Al Qusais Industrial Area

  8. Damascus Road, 3

  9. Damascus Road

  10. Al Khulafa’a Al Rashideen Boys School

  11. Dubai Airport Free Zone Metro

  12. Al Nahda Metro

  13. Ministry Of Information

  14. Shabab Al Ahli Club

  15. Al Jadeed Bakery

  16. Dubai Scout Mission

  17. Abu Baker Al Siddique Metro

  18. Hamarain Center

  19. Al Bakhit Center

  20. DNATA

  21. City Centre Metro Â· 1

  22. Umm Hurair, Road

Bus X28 Station Overview

Lulu Village

The Lulu Village bus station is a prominent transit point located near Lulu Village, a popular residential and commercial area. This station caters to local residents and shoppers, offering essential amenities such as comfortable waiting areas and schedule information displays.

Its strategic location ensures easy access to Lulu Villageâ€™s various shops, restaurants, and residential complexes, making it a key stop for those frequenting the area. The stationâ€™s facilities and its proximity to local amenities make it an integral part of the communityâ€™s daily transportation network.

Intersecting at Damascus Road 3 Bus Stop

The Damascus Road 3 Bus Stop serves as a major intersection for multiple bus routes, including 17, 43, 13B, C26, F8, F81, and X28. This key transit point provides seamless connections between these diverse routes, offering passengers efficient travel options across different areas. The stationâ€™s central location and well-maintained facilities enhance the convenience and accessibility of public transportation in the region.

Al Khulafaâ€™a Al Rashideen Boys School 2 Intersection

The Al Khulafaâ€™a Al Rashideen Boys School 2 bus stop is a crucial transit point where several key bus routes intersect. This location connects Bus Route 43, F81, X28, and C18, offering passengers seamless travel options across various parts of the city. Its strategic position facilitates easy transfers and enhances connectivity, making it an important hub for commuters and travelers in the area.

Intersection of Bus Routes at Muhaisnah 4, Jamal Building

The bus stop at Muhaisnah 4, Jamal Building is a significant intersection for Bus Routes X28, 34, and 56. This key location connects these routes, providing efficient transit options and easy access to various destinations within the Muhaisnah area and beyond. The stop is equipped with essential amenities and real-time schedule updates to enhance the travel experience for passengers using these intersecting bus services.

City Centre Metro

Dubai Bus C10 and Dubai Bus X28 share several key stops, with one notable common point being City Centre Metro. This intersection indicates a potential overlap in their routes, allowing passengers to transfer between these two bus services at this central location. The presence of City Centre Metro as a shared stop facilitates easier connections between different parts of Dubai, enhancing the efficiency of travel across the city’s extensive public transport network.

Agora Mall

The Agora Mall bus station is strategically positioned near Agora Mall, a key retail and entertainment destination. This station is designed to support the high traffic of shoppers and visitors to the mall, featuring amenities like sheltered waiting areas and real-time bus schedule updates.

Its location provides convenient access to the mallâ€™s diverse shopping options, dining establishments, and entertainment facilities.

Bus Ticket Price

Traveling on the X28 bus is affordable, with ticket prices structured to be accessible to all commuters. Prices are kept reasonable, reflecting the commitment to providing an economical travel option within Dubai’s public transport network, typically around AED 3-5.

Bus Booking

While specific details on online booking for the X28 bus route may vary, passengers can typically board the bus directly at designated stops or terminals without prior reservation. Information on ticketing and schedules is readily available at bus stops, online portals, and through mobile apps for easy access and planning.

Journey Experience

A trip on the X28 bus from Lulu Village to Agora Mall offers a long yet fascinating journey through some of Dubaiâ€™s bustling residential and commercial areas. Starting at Lulu Village, known for its diverse community and vibrant local markets, the bus route travels through key parts of the city, providing glimpses of local life and urban development.

Along the way, passengers can experience the seamless blend of Dubai’s old and new urban landscapes.

Traveling with Careem

Using the Careem app, travelers can conveniently reach Agora Mall, situated at the far end of the X28 bus route starting from Lulu Village. This bus route traverses through various key locations in Dubai, offering a cost-effective transportation option with fares typically ranging from AED 82 to 99. Whether for shopping, leisure, or daily commuting, the X28 bus provides a reliable service connecting passengers across different neighborhoods and landmarks in the city.

Exploring Dubai via the X28 bus route offers not only a practical mode of transportation but also an opportunity to discover the city’s vibrant neighborhoods and landmarks efficiently. Whether commuting for work or exploring leisure activities, the X28 bus ensures a seamless journey through Dubai’s dynamic urban landscape.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: July 19, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
